# NeverRanked

> NeverRanked is a research practice that measures what AI answer engines actually cite in a category. We previously shipped a snippet-based product that claimed to drive AI citations. We tested it against our own domain in a pre-registered kill test, the result was zero, and we have stopped selling it. The company has been rebuilt around the measurement layer that does work. This file reflects the current state, not the prior one.

## About

- [Homepage](https://neverranked.com): When AI answers, does it name your business? Across 10 measurements (9 Hawaii categories plus a cross-geo CPA market in Austin, TX), AI tools name only a handful of businesses per buyer question.
- Direct contact: Lance@hi.neverranked.com

## What we actually do now

- Daily measurement across seven AI tools: five citation-grade tools that search the live web (Perplexity, ChatGPT search, Gemini grounded, Microsoft Copilot via Bing, Google AI Overviews) and two model-knowledge tools (Claude, Gemma).
- Per question, per AI tool, per competitor, per source type. The output is a forensic research memo, not a dashboard.
- The deliverable: a prepped punch list for the customer's team to execute. We do not make the changes ourselves. The boundary is structural.

## Published teardowns (proof of methodology)

10 measurements published so far: 9 Hawaii categories plus a cross-geo CPA market (Austin, TX), 39 substantiated claims in total. Non-customer businesses are anonymized on these public pages; the fully named cohort ships only inside a customer's 1:1 deliverable.

- [Cross-category teardown](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/cross-category/): the same 7-AI-tool methodology across every category, including the training-data collapse finding (the two model-knowledge tools name far fewer businesses than the web-searching tools).
- [Hawaii consumer banking](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/bank-honolulu/): the roughly 75-percentage-point spread between Microsoft Copilot and the other web-searching AI tools.
- [Honolulu dental](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/dental-honolulu/): Microsoft Copilot cites zero practice websites cohort-wide; insurance-carrier provider directories are a measurable AEO surface most practices treat as paperwork.
- [Hawaii law firms](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/law-firm-hawaii/): citation share concentrates in a small top tier; the closable ground sits outside it.
- [Hawaii wealth management](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/wealth-mgmt-hawaii/): lead-gen platforms and financial-planner directories account for a large share of third-party citations.
- [Hawaii CPAs](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/cpa-hawaii/) and [Austin CPAs](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/cpa-austin/): the same category measured in two geographies (the cross-geo match).
- [Honolulu med spas](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/med-spa-honolulu/), [Honolulu HVAC](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/hvac-honolulu/), [Honolulu real estate](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/real-estate-honolulu/), and [Hawaii hotels](https://neverranked.com/teardowns/hotels-hawaii/): local-service and hospitality categories measured with the same method.

## Substantiation surfaces

- [Methodology](https://neverranked.com/methodology/): The 7 AI tools, the question-set discipline, the source-type classifier, the pattern-readiness rule, the cross-category aggregate.
- [Example 18-question set](https://neverranked.com/methodology/#query-set): the actual locked Hawaii wealth-management question set from a real 1:1 brief.
- [How we differ from dashboard-style AEO tools](https://neverranked.com/vs/): structural comparison.
- [What an engagement actually produces](https://neverranked.com/example-engagement/): a real anonymized example deliverable.
- [The first 30 days, day by day](https://neverranked.com/first-30-days/): engagement timeline.
- [FAQ](https://neverranked.com/faq/): the predictable buyer questions, answered honestly.

- [Hawaii consumer banks](https://neverranked.com/hawaii-bank-aeo/)
- [Hawaii wealth management firms](https://neverranked.com/hawaii-wealth-aeo/)

- [Hawaii law firms](https://neverranked.com/hawaii-law-aeo/)
- [Hawaii CPA firms](https://neverranked.com/hawaii-cpa-aeo/)
- [Austin CPA firms](https://neverranked.com/austin-cpa-aeo/)

## Free tools

- [AI search check](https://check.neverranked.com): Free, instant, self-serve. Enter a URL and see what AI tools can and cannot read from the site.

## What we no longer do

- We no longer ship a JavaScript snippet that claims to drive AI citations. The crawlers AI tools use do not execute JavaScript.
- We no longer publish per-customer AEO scores as a product. The scoring methodology that produced them did not predict citation behavior the way we claimed.
- We no longer operate a reseller / white-label agency partner program. The new agency channel model is force multiplier, not reseller.
- We no longer publish the blog catalog, case study catalog, or pitch pages that promoted any of the above. Those URLs return retired-content holders.

## Pricing

- $4,500 kickoff per category. One time. Includes the 18-question set design, three weeks of daily measurement across 7 AI tools, competitive cohort analysis, source-type analysis, the research memo, and the prepped punch list.
- $1,500 per month per category, ongoing. Continued daily measurement, monthly memo, drift monitoring, punch list refreshes.
- Per category, not per client. A research practice, not a SaaS subscription.

## Operational discipline

- 10 measurements published across 9 Hawaii categories (banking, wealth management, dental, law, CPA, med spa, HVAC, real estate, hotels) plus a cross-geo CPA market in Austin, TX. All cleared the pattern-readiness threshold (3+ usable runs per category).
- Cohort coverage is updated continuously; numbers refresh accordingly, and public self-correction is part of the discipline.
- Question sets are locked by hash before measurement starts; the lock never breaks.
- A fail-closed factual grader reviews every prospect-facing artifact before ship and rejects unsubstantiated claims.

## Honest framing

NeverRanked is a small, founder-led, Hawaii-based research practice. Any older content that contradicts what is on this page should be treated as retracted. The current state is this file, https://neverranked.com, and the 10 measurements linked above.
